title: Onecraft + Undertale(Sadley cancled untill further notice)
description: This is my minecraft mod based on the game oneshot this adds serveral items, structures and characters from the game oneshot it adds 2 music discs, a new dimension, 9 new charaters and 5 paintings!
body:
# **What is this mod?💡**
Two good games, minecraft and Oneshot what
if they were combinied into one universe?
Well this mod answers this never asked question before.

# **Features**
5 New dimensions (2 not added will be realeased in next update)
18 new characters
New light
Niko + pancakes
A boss (next update)
5 structure(way more in the future)
Custom models for some blocks and items
3 new advancements(2 isnt out yet and more in the future)
The Sun
# **Usage💡**
To use this mod, you need geckolib(
wont need to be used next update) and pehkui
on forge 1.20.1
# **Compatability**
No known issues with bugs and stuff from other mods!
Unfotunatly is cancelled im not sure if ill make a remake or not but thansk for yall downloading it
